title: duranta erecta var. alba
intro: Duranta erecta var. alba, also known as Blue Sky Flower or White Sky Flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is a shrub or small tree that has white flowers and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Duranta erecta var. alba include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Duranta erecta var. alba include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications for various health issues.
